page.title: 5S Audit
page.subtitle: Assess a zone's order and cleanliness (Seiri…Shitsuke). Guidance only — the team decides.

zoneEntry.title: Restricted Zone Entry
zoneEntry.intro: Review your site's restricted zones and log your informed entry. This view never blocks your access: it informs you and leaves a record so your supervisor can follow up.
zoneEntry.noProject: Select a project to see its zones.
zoneEntry.offline: Offline — the entry record is not sent automatically; retry when you reconnect.
zoneEntry.empty: No restricted zones have been defined for this site yet.
zoneEntry.confirmEpp: Check the PPE you are wearing now
zoneEntry.permitMissing: No active permit of this type
zoneEntry.permitUnmapped: This zone requires a permit, but its type has no permit configured. Confirm with your supervisor before entering.
zoneEntry.permitsError: We couldn't verify your active permits. Reconnect before continuing.
zoneEntry.needSignIn: Sign in to register your entry.
zoneEntry.logError: We couldn't record the entry. Please try again.
zoneEntry.logOffline: Offline: your entry was NOT recorded (no automatic retry). Your access is not blocked; record it again when you reconnect.

circadian.heading: Circadian alertness status
circadian.help: Orientative NIOSH-based estimate (local hour, sleep, consecutive night shifts). It is a recommendation — it never blocks equipment operation.

climateRoutes.schematicBadge: Active EONET events at real positions · illustrative route line
climateRoutes.assessmentUnavailable: We couldn't complete the route's climate assessment. Drive with caution and retry when you have a better connection.

auth.consent_notice: By signing in, you accept our awareness network and security protocols.

hero.title: Plans and legal compliance
hero.subtitle: Capacity (workers + projects) decides the tier · Regulatory compliance is billed per project · Multi-country at no extra cost.

cobre: Up to 24 workers per site (no Committee)
diamante: Private API with enterprise rate limits
ilimitado: Vertex Fine-Tuned: your own AI model
global-titanio: Worldwide coverage: ISO 45001 + your country + any additional jurisdiction

payment_banners.web_title: Pay with Webpay, MercadoPago or Khipu — electronic invoice included
payment_banners.web_body: CL → Webpay (Transbank). LATAM (PE/AR/CO/MX/BR) → MercadoPago. B2B bank transfer → Khipu. For Titanium plans and above use Talk to sales.
payment_banners.android_body: Your subscription is billed and managed from your Google Play account. You can cancel any time from Play Store › Subscriptions.
payment_banners.ios_body: Your subscription is billed and managed from your Apple ID. You can cancel or restore previous purchases from Settings › Subscriptions.

compliance_alert.title: Regulatory compliance alert
compliance_alert.body: You have {{workers}} workers registered. You need the {{plan}} plan to maintain coverage.

transparency_block.title: Why prevention shouldn't be opaque
transparency_block.body: We publish how we bill, what each tier includes, and when an upgrade actually makes sense. Compare it against real alternatives in the Chilean market.

return_banner.paid_body: We charged {{total}} to your card. Your subscription is now active{{invoice}}. We sent the electronic receipt to your registered email.
return_banner.rejected_default_reason: Your card did not authorize the charge.
return_banner.cancelled_default_reason: The transaction was cancelled before completion.
return_banner.rejected_body: {{reason}}{{invoice}} You can try a different payment method by selecting the plan again.
return_banner.refunded_body: We refunded {{total}} to your original payment method{{invoice}}. The credit may take 1-2 business days depending on your bank.
return_banner.timeout_title: Your payment is taking longer than usual
return_banner.timeout_body: We couldn't confirm the status of your transaction{{invoice}} within the expected time. If the charge appears on your statement but the subscription wasn't activated, contact us at
return_banner.error_body: We received the Webpay response{{invoice}} but couldn't confirm it. Please write to us at
return_banner.rejected_loading_body: Your card did not authorize the charge{{invoice}}. We're verifying the final status with Webpay…
return_banner.retry_body: We had a temporary issue processing your payment{{invoice}}. Verifying status with the bank — select the plan again if the invoice is still pending.
return_banner.loading_body: We received the Webpay response{{invoice}}. Confirming with the bank — this usually takes a few seconds.

checkout.error_default: We couldn't start the payment. Try again in a few seconds.
checkout.login_required_msg: You need to sign in to subscribe to a paid plan.
checkout.provider_unavailable: The payment provider is not available. Try again in a few seconds or contact contacto@praeventio.net.
checkout.khipu_unavailable: Khipu is not available right now. Try again in a few seconds or pay by card via Webpay.
checkout.method_subtitle: {{tier}} plan — both methods are secure and charged in Chilean pesos (CLP).
checkout.mp_unavailable: MercadoPago is not available. Try again in a few seconds or contact contacto@praeventio.net.
checkout.international_msg: We currently only process payments in Chile and LATAM markets. Write to contacto@praeventio.net for your country.
checkout.contact_sales_msg: {{tier}} requires a custom proposal. We'll contact you.
checkout.store_purchase_failed: We couldn't complete the store purchase.
checkout.store_received_msg: We're confirming your subscription with the store. This usually takes a few seconds.
checkout.store_start_failed: We couldn't start the store payment.
checkout.mailto_body:
Hi, I'm interested in the {{tier}} plan ({{workers}} workers / {{projects}} projects).

Please send me a proposal.

emergency.survival_wake_lock_warning: ⚠ Screen may turn off — keep your finger on the screen to prevent it
emergency.survival_listening_hint: Listening — 3 loud knocks automatically activate the beacon
emergency.survival_step_subtitle: Follow these instructions step by step.
emergency.survival_breathing_signal_active: Your signal is active. Rescue is on the way.
emergency.survival_breathing_subtitle: Breathing slowly reduces oxygen consumption and keeps your mind clear.
emergency.guide_first_aid_step_1: Secure the area before approaching the victim.
emergency.guide_first_aid_step_2: Assess consciousness: "Sir/Ma'am, can you hear me?".
emergency.guide_first_aid_step_3: If unresponsive, check breathing (look, listen, feel).
emergency.guide_first_aid_step_4: If not breathing, start CPR (30 compressions x 2 breaths).
emergency.guide_fire_step_1: Activate the alarm and evacuate immediately.
emergency.guide_fire_step_2: If there is smoke, crawl close to the floor (clean air is below).
emergency.guide_fire_step_3: Touch doors before opening; if hot, find another exit.
emergency.guide_fire_step_4: Do not use elevators under any circumstances.
emergency.guide_fire_step_5: Head to the designated Meeting Point.
emergency.guide_earthquake_step_1: Stay calm. Drop, cover, and hold on.
emergency.guide_earthquake_step_2: Move away from windows, shelves, and objects that may fall.
emergency.guide_earthquake_step_3: If outdoors, move away from buildings, trees, and poles.
emergency.guide_earthquake_step_4: Wait for the shaking to stop before evacuating.
emergency.guide_earthquake_step_5: Do not light matches or use elevators.

medical_card.consent: I authorize sharing this card in an emergency (with rescuers and over the Bluetooth mesh network) to speed up my care.
medical_card.subtitle: Only on your device. Shown to rescuers only if you authorize it, to speed up your care in an emergency.
medical_card.title: Emergency medical card

emergency.public_subtitle: Call directly or use the offline guides. No sign-in needed.

curriculum.error_empty_claim: Write your claim content before signing it.
curriculum.error_invalid_email: Check the reference emails — one is invalid.
curriculum.error_same_email: The two references must have different emails.
curriculum.error_no_biometric: Your device does not support fingerprint; you must confirm the manual declaration to continue.
curriculum.error_inactive_session: Your session is inactive. Please sign in again.
curriculum.error_biometric_fail: We could not confirm the fingerprint. Cancel and try again.
curriculum.success_message: The two people you named will receive an email with a magic link to co-sign. Your claim will be verified once both sign (max 14 days).
curriculum.form_subtitle: Your word signed with fingerprint + 2 references = fraud-proof CV.
curriculum.field_claim_placeholder: E.g.: I have worked 5 years as a safety foreman on site without serious incidents.
curriculum.fallback_attest: Your device does not support biometric signing. Tick this box to manually declare that the claim content is truthful (recorded in the audit log).

epp_character.subtitle_complete: Your personal protective equipment is complete and verified for current conditions.

realtime_status.recommendation_mining: Check ventilation and ground-support systems. Monitor fatigue in heavy-machinery operators.
realtime_status.recommendation_construction: Inspect scaffolding and lifelines. Ensure correct harness use for work at height.
realtime_status.recommendation_manufacturing: Review safety guards on moving machinery. Keep aisles clear of obstacles.
realtime_status.recommendation_agriculture: Ensure constant hydration and breaks in the shade. Check PPE for agrochemical application.
realtime_status.recommendation_energy: Confirm energy lockouts (LOTO) before interventions. Use certified dielectric PPE.
realtime_status.recommendation_default: Keep work areas tidy and clean. Take active breaks every 2 hours.

compliance_modal.action_findings_desc: There are 3 "High" level findings reported last week that still have no corrective measures implemented.

morning_checkin.subtitle: Shift Synchronization
morning_checkin.psychosocial_prompt: How do you feel about facing today's shift, {{name}}?

structural_calc.title: Structural and Load Calculator
structural_calc.subtitle: Estimate Safe Working Load (SWL) for bolts, slings and scaffolds.
structural_calc.specs_placeholder: E.g. 3/4 inch diameter, Grade 8.8, under pure tension...
structural_calc.safety_warning_body: Results generated by this tool are theoretical estimates based on general standards. They must NEVER replace the calculation and signature of a certified Structural Engineer.
structural_calc.empty_prompt: Enter the element specifications to calculate its safe working load.
structural_calc.wind_subtitle: Quick estimation of wind thrust force on a surface.
structural_calc.local_calc_note: Local calculation based on Bernoulli's principle. For full structural analysis, consult NCh 432.

buckling.title: Euler Buckling (P_cr)
buckling.subtitle: Elastic stability of columns: scaffolds, struts, and temporary structures.
buckling.warning_body: Safety factor is below the recommended minimum of 2.0. Review dimensions, bracing, or reduce the applied load.
buckling.note: P_cr = π²·E·I / (K·L)². Ideal elastic model (Euler 1744). Does not apply for large imperfections or inelastic regime.

hazmat_designer.title: Facility Designer (OGUC / DS 43)
hazmat_designer.subtitle: Code-compliant design for hazardous-material warehouses.
hazmat_designer.empty_prompt: Enter storage parameters to generate the construction and safety requirements.
hazmat_designer.error_design: Facility design error. Please try again.
hazmat_designer.venturi_subtitle: Local (Bernoulli) calculation of air extraction for chemical warehouses. Ref.: DS 594 Art. 35.
hazmat_designer.ach_warning: ACH below the {{minAch}} minimum required by DS 594 Art. 35 for chemical storage. Increase A₂, ΔP or reduce volume.
hazmat_designer.invalid_params: Enter valid parameters (A₁ > A₂, ΔP ≥ 0) to calculate extraction.
hazmat_designer.bernoulli_note: Local calculation via Bernoulli/Venturi equation (ρ air = 1.225 kg/m³). Ref.: DS 594 Art. 35.

meta.title: Guardian Praeventio - Risk prevention in the palm of your hand
meta.description: Risk management, team wellbeing, and regulatory compliance - all in one AI-powered platform

hero.subtitle: Risk management, team wellbeing, and regulatory compliance - all in one AI-powered platform
hero.description: AI, emergencies, and Chilean regulatory compliance in a single app. For companies that take worker safety seriously.
hero.free_tier_note: Free up to 10 workers . No credit card required

problem.title: Why Guardian
problem.body: Risk prevention in Chile is still stuck in spreadsheets and paperwork. Guardian digitizes incident reporting and team training, and uses AI to detect patterns before accidents happen.

features.title: Everything you need to comply with the law
features.subtitle: Built for Chilean companies. Every tool the regulations require, paperless.

emergency.title: Emergency Response
emergency.desc: Panic button, real-time geolocation, and mass alerts to the whole team in seconds.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.desc: Gemini Pro generates automatic JSAs, assesses risks, and guides you through DS 44/2024 (replaces DS 40/1969 and the former DS 54), and Law 16.744.

training.title: Training
training.desc: Videos, quizzes, and gamification. Log training sessions and earn digital certificates automatically.

iso.title: ISO Audits
iso.desc: ISO 45001 and OHSAS 18001 checklists and SUSESO reports generated as PDF in one click.

teams.title: Team Management
teams.desc: Per-project roles (manager, safety officer, supervisor), email invitations, and multi-company support.

dashboard.title: Executive Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Real-time KPIs, accident rates, injury-frequency rate, and compliance by project.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: From report to compliance in three steps.

step1.title: Record
step1.desc: Report risks and incidents from any device. Web, mobile, voice.

step2.title: AI analyzes
step2.desc: The Guardian assistant, powered by Gemini AI, detects patterns, suggests corrective actions, and prioritizes by severity.

step3.title: Automatic compliance
step3.desc: DIAT, site logbooks, CPHS minutes, and SUSESO reports generated in seconds.

pricing.title: Plans for every company
pricing.subtitle: Scale as your company grows. Start free today.
pricing.footnote: Enterprise plans up to 5,000 workers · Prices in USD

final_cta.subtitle: Create your account, add your company, and comply with Chilean regulations from day one.

footer.tagline: Risk prevention in the palm of your hand.

notifications.subtitle: Stay on top of safety alerts and updates

psychosocial.protocol_text: The SUSESO/ISTAS21 questionnaire is the official instrument in Chile for measuring psychosocial risks at work. It evaluates dimensions such as psychological demands, active work, social support, compensation and double presence.

risk_network.title: The Brain
risk_network.subtitle: Neural Network of Prevention and Knowledge

info_banner.title: How does the Neural Network work?
info_banner.body: Each risk analysis, worker, or regulation becomes a knowledge "node". The system automatically connects these nodes to surface invisible patterns, enabling proactive management based on data interconnection.

risk_network.graph_viz_hint: Interact with the nodes to see details
risk_network.capacity_note: The neural network is operating at {{capacity}}% of its projected capacity. Each new connection reduces operational uncertainty by 2.4%.
risk_network.predictive_hub_desc: Cross-reference Neural Network data with real-time telemetry to predict accidents before they happen.

external_events.title: Events in area
external_events.empty: No relevant events in the project area.
external_events.driving_wildfire_banner: Consider an alternate route — natural event in the area
external_events.driving_wildfire_normative: Regulatory reference: DS 594 + safe driving guidelines.

webxr.title: Interactive Training — Work at Height
webxr.description: Hands-on fall-arrest training under DS 594 Art. 53. Tick each PPE item on the visual checklist.
webxr.subtitle: DS 594 Art. 53 · Tick every PPE item
webxr.startPrompt: Start the training to enable the checklist markers
webxr.diagramAria: PPE schematic for work at height
webxr.registerPrompt: Save this training in your history.

import.title: Import data from Excel
import.subtitle: Upload your spreadsheet, review errors and confirm the import.

dropzone.placeholder: Drag your Excel file here, or click to select

accessibility.title: Accessibility modes
accessibility.subtitle: Adapt Praeventio Guard to your needs. Each mode can be turned on independently and is saved on this device.

easyReading.title: Easy reading
easyReading.description: Increases text size and simplifies typography to improve readability.
easyReading.previewBody: This text appears larger with more line spacing when the mode is enabled.

highContrast.title: High contrast
highContrast.description: Inverts the main colors to improve readability in low-visibility conditions.
highContrast.previewBody: Colors are inverted: black background with white text, ideal under strong sunlight.

glovesMode.title: Gloves mode
glovesMode.description: Enlarges buttons and tap targets to 56px or more so you can use the app with work gloves.
glovesMode.previewBody: Every button becomes easily reachable with thick industrial gloves.

lowConnectivity.title: Low connectivity
lowConnectivity.description: Shows friendly hints when the network is slow or flaky and favours offline-first loading.
lowConnectivity.previewBody: Instead of spinners you will see skeleton placeholders and clear messages about the network state.

header.title: Pricing & ROI Calculator
header.subtitle: Estimate your recommended plan, monthly cost, return and PPE budget in one place.

recommendation.title: Recommended plan
recommendation.coverage: Covers up to {{w}} workers and {{p}} projects.
recommendation.upgradeHint: We suggest upgrading to {{tier}} — cheaper than paying overage.

current.title: Estimated monthly cost (current tier)
current.overCapacity: Current tier exceeds capacity — upgrade required.

epp.title: Estimated PPE budget
epp.disclaimer: Catalog and prices indicative per DS 594. For a real quote consult your supplier.
epp.viewOc: View suggested PO with item detail

actions.todoNote: For now downloads JSON · formal PDF pending Sprint K §177.

scenario.title: ROI scenario comparator
scenario.subtitle: Scenario derived from your inputs (active project {{project}}), computed server-side.
scenario.empty: Select an active project to compare ROI scenarios on the server.

header.title: Suggested Purchase Order
header.subtitle: Recommended PPE by industry with quantity and total CLP cost.

incident_report.title: Report near-miss
incident_report.subtitle: Your observation matters. Reporting near-misses saves lives — and earns XP for your crew. Zero penalty: the POSITIVE culture only reinforces.
incident_report.select_project: Select an active project before reporting.
incident_report.type_post_mortem_hint: Root-cause analysis after a major event.
incident_report.what_placeholder: Briefly describe: place, what you saw, possible cause.
incident_report.err_must_login: You must sign in to report.
incident_report.err_generic: Could not report. Please try again.

lone_worker.title: Lone worker
lone_worker.fgs_not_native: Web platform — foreground service does not apply.
lone_worker.fgs_no_plugin: Plugin not available in this build.
lone_worker.select_project: Select a project to use lone-worker check-in.
lone_worker.no_active_session: You have no active lone-worker session.
lone_worker.start_need_project: Select a project to start your session.
lone_worker.persist_failed: Could not save the check-in. Please retry.
lone_worker.help_not_sent: ⚠️ Your HELP request was not saved. Call by radio or phone NOW — the automatic escalation will NOT fire.
lone_worker.checkin_not_saved: The check-in was not saved. Retry; if it persists, notify your supervisor.
lone_worker.session_load_failed: Could not load your lone-worker session. Check your connection — do NOT start another (avoid duplicates).

zone_editor.title: Restricted-zone editor
zone_editor.no_project: Select a project to define its restricted zones.
zone_editor.need_role: Only admin, prevencionista or supervisor can define restricted zones.
zone_editor.draw_hint: Draw the perimeter on the map with the polygon tool.
zone_editor.err_name: Enter a name for the zone.
zone_editor.err_perimeter: Draw the zone perimeter on the map (minimum 3 points).
zone_editor.err_window: The end must be after the start.

sif_page.title: SIF Precursors
sif_page.subtitle: Near-misses with serious-injury or fatality (SIF) potential. They require executive review and, where applicable, client (mandante) notification.
sif_page.no_project: Select a project to view its SIF precursors.
sif_page.load_failed: Could not load the SIF precursors.

evac_dashboard.title: Evacuation dashboard
evac_dashboard.no_project: Select a project to manage its evacuation.
evac_dashboard.no_attendance: No attendance recorded today. An evacuation count needs the present roster to know WHO is missing: record the shift's attendance (check-in) and return to this screen.
evac_dashboard.attendance_error: Could not load today's attendance. Retry; without the roster a reliable evacuation count cannot be started.
evac_dashboard.no_tenant: Your session has no organization assigned (or it could not be read). Retry; if it persists, sign in with your company account.
evac_dashboard.lookup_failed: Could not verify whether an evacuation is already in progress. Retry before starting a new one to avoid duplicating the count.

lone_worker_page.title: Lone worker
lone_worker_page.subtitle: Control of workers operating in remote or isolated zones. Mandatory periodic check-in; without response, escalation is automatic (supervisor → brigade → emergency services).

empty.select_project: Select a project to start lone-worker sessions.

form.heading: New session
form.geo_note: If you enable geolocation, the check-in will include coordinates. Session is self-tracking (you are the worker).

active.heading: Active sessions ({{count}})
active.empty: No active lone workers in this project.

admin_panel.heading: Supervisor view
admin_panel.note: Status and escalation computed server-side (authoritative clock, no device clock skew). Sorted by criticality.

exceptions_page.title: Documented exceptions
exceptions_page.subtitle: Each exception to a normal control (training gap, expired PPE, pending permit) requires written alternative mitigation + max 168 h duration + role-gated approver. The system enforces an auditable format.

empty.select_project: Select a project to register exceptions.

form.heading: New exception
form.reason_placeholder: E.g.: Working-at-heights training expires 05/23, critical task ends 05/25; request 48h extension with additional watcher.
form.field_mitigation: Alternative mitigation (min 20 chars) — what replaces it
form.mitigation_placeholder: E.g.: Permanent certified watcher + 2 shift checks + double-redundant PPE (harness + primary + secondary lifelines).

feedback.need_project: You need an active project and to be authenticated.
feedback.revoke_cancelled: Revocation cancelled or reason too short.

stoppages.title: Work stoppages (stop-work)
stoppages.subtitle: Every stoppage is logged with authorship, reason, and resumption preconditions. Resumption is NOT automatic — it requires verification.

empty.select_project: Select a project to view stoppages.

form.heading: New stoppage
form.reason_placeholder: Describe the identified risk, conditions observed, applicable regulation…
form.preconditions_note: Default preconditions: visual inspection + OHS authorization + photo record. You can edit them later per individual stoppage.
form.voluntary_only: As a worker you can declare a voluntary stop-work. Other categories are declared by a supervisor, safety officer, or manager.

feedback.need_project: You need an active project and to be authenticated.
feedback.declared_success: Stoppage declared ({{id}}). Appears in active list.

list.empty_active: No active stoppages in this project.

resume.approver_only: Resumption must be signed by a supervisor, safety officer, or manager.

stoppages.sub_error: Could not load stoppages. Retry; do not assume there are none active.

history.heading: Recent history
history.audit_trail_hint_prefix: For complete history of finalized or cancelled stoppages, see

checklistVehiculo.title: Vehicle Pre-Op Checklist
checklistVehiculo.subtitle: Pre-use check for vehicles and mobile equipment. This is guidance — it recommends, it does not stop the operation.

calcPandeo.title: Buckling Calculator (Euler)
calcPandeo.subtitle: Euler critical buckling load for columns/struts. Engineering guidance — it does not replace the formal structural calc nor authorize a load.

cargaMental.title: Daily Mental Workload
cargaMental.subtitle: Workload self-assessment (NASA-TLX). Score the 6 dimensions; the system computes your level and suggests actions. It is guidance — it stops nothing.
cargaMental.noRecs: Load within a manageable range. Keep taking breaks and report any change to your prevention lead.
cargaMental.disclaimer: This workload self-assessment (NASA Task Load Index) is computed on your device: it is not stored or sent. It is not a medical or mental-health diagnosis.

lineaDeFuego.title: Line of Fire
lineaDeFuego.subtitle: Assess struck-by / caught-between exposure and verify mitigations. This is guidance — it does not stop the task.
lineaDeFuego.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. hoisting a beam over a walkway

critical_controls.title: Critical controls by risk
critical_controls.subtitle: HCA (Hierarchy of Controls) catalog ISO 45001 § 8.1.2. Mark controls present on-site; the system validates coverage + hierarchy balance before authorizing task start.

empty.select_project: Select a project to register validations.

result.hierarchy_unbalanced: Unbalanced hierarchy: only low-level controls (PPE) are reported. Add engineering or elimination controls before starting.

root_cause.title: Root cause (no-blame)
root_cause.subtitle: ILO/ANSI Z10 taxonomy + 5 whys. The analysis does NOT seek culprits — it identifies system conditions that allowed the incident in order to correct them. The supervisor who closes the analysis signs it with their UID.

empty.select_project: Select a project to register analyses.

form.heading: New analysis
form.five_whys_label: 5 whys (min 15 characters per line, leave non-applicable empty)
form.actions_label: Suggested corrective actions (one per line, min 1)
form.actions_placeholder:
E.g.: Train team on harness use every 6 months
Install permanent lifeline in zone X

feedback.need_project: You need an active project and to be authenticated.

history.heading: History ({{count}})
history.empty: No root-cause analyses in this project yet.
history.select_hint: Select an analysis on the left to view the detail.

custody.heading: Evidence chain of custody
custody.error: Could not load the chain of custody.
custody.empty: No evidence with a chain of custody is linked to this incident yet.

consistency_audit.title: Cross-module consistency
consistency_audit.subtitle: Automatic internal auditor that detects contradictions between modules: workers assigned without valid training, PPE that doesn't match the role, documents approved without signature, actions closed without evidence, permits whose approver no longer exists, etc. 12 deterministic rules (no LLM).

empty.select_project: Select a project to run the audit.

feedback.need_project: Select a project to run the audit.

stats.summary: Workers: {{w}} · Tasks: {{ta}} · Docs: {{d}} · CAs: {{ca}} · Permits: {{p}} · Trainings: {{tr}}

no_issues.title: No inconsistencies detected
no_issues.subtitle: The 12 audit rules found no contradictions between project modules in this run.

site_book.title: Site book
site_book.subtitle: Digital site book with year-based consecutive folios (DS 76). Entries immutable after signature; corrections require a new entry with its own folio referencing the corrected one.

empty.select_project: Select a project to view / add entries.
empty.no_entries: No entries yet. Create the first one with "New entry".

feedback.need_project: Select a project and valid authentication.

shift_handover.title: Shift handover
shift_handover.subtitle: Formal outgoing → incoming supervisor handover. Chronological log during the shift + categorized notes with severity so the incoming supervisor prioritizes upon receipt.

empty.select_project: Select a project to start shifts.

pending_ack.heading: Pending handover to receive
pending_ack.summary: The outgoing supervisor closed the {{kind}} shift with {{notes}} note(s) and {{followups}} follow-up(s). Confirm receipt to take the incoming shift.
pending_ack.notes_placeholder: Optional notes from incoming supervisor (what you prioritize from the handover)…

cost_scenarios.title: Prevention cost scenarios
cost_scenarios.subtitle: Compare the cost of an incident without prevention vs the estimated savings with active prevention, and save scenarios to review with management. Reference figures (Law 16.744, SUSESO/DT) — they do not replace legal advice.

empty.select_project: Select a project to simulate and save cost scenarios.

saved.label: Saved scenarios for the project
saved.heading: Saved scenarios ({{n}})
saved.error: Could not load the saved scenarios. Please try again.
saved.empty: No scenarios saved for this project yet. Simulate one above and save it.

change_management.title: Change control (MOC)
change_management.subtitle: Declare operational changes, track read-confirmation coverage, and acknowledge the ones that affect you. Many accidents stem from poorly communicated changes — ISO 45001 §8.1.3.

empty.select_project: Select a project to manage its operational changes.

feedback.declared: Change declared ({{id}}). Awaiting acknowledgment from affected workers.

operational_changes.title: Management of change (MOC)
operational_changes.subtitle: Each operational change (supervisor, procedure, PPE, equipment, critical control, applicable rule) is logged with rationale, impact, and read receipt by affected workers. ISO 45001 §8.1.3 — Management of Change.

feedback.need_project: You need an active project and valid authentication.
feedback.declared: Change declared ({{id}}). {{n}} workers must confirm reading.
feedback.revert_cancelled: Revert cancelled or reason too short (min 15 chars).

form.heading: New change
form.what_changed_placeholder: E.g.: Lifting procedure in north zone

legal_calendar.title: Legal calendar
legal_calendar.subtitle: Recurring legal obligations: audits, environmental measurements, training renewals, CPHS meetings, mutual reports, drills, occupational exams, document and permit renewals. DS 76 / DS 132 / DS 44/2024 / Law 16.744.

feedback.bootstrap_ok: Initialized {{n}} standard obligations (DS 76, DS 132, DS 44/2024, etc.).

bootstrap.title: No obligations loaded for this project.
bootstrap.hint: Bootstrap initializes the calendar with standard obligations (annual audits, semestral measurements, monthly CPHS, drills, etc.) with dates computed from today.

server_section.heading: Upcoming obligations (server)
server_section.empty: No obligations due soon for this project.

safety_talks.title: Safety talks
safety_talks.subtitle: Deterministic daily topic suggester based on contextual signals (active risks, today's tasks, recent incidents, weather). No LLM — top 3 suggestions with rationale citing triggers.

audit_portals.title: Auditor portals
audit_portals.subtitle: Temporary scoped access for external auditors (SUSESO, mutualidad, ISO certifier, mandante, SEREMI, DT). 64-char hex token; TTL 1-90 days; selectable modules. Manually revocable before expiration.

feedback.need_project: You need an active project and valid authentication.
feedback.revoke_cancelled: Revocation cancelled or reason too short.
feedback.copy_failed: Could not copy — please copy manually.

form.heading: New portal
form.field_notes: Internal notes (optional, not visible to auditor)

document_read.title: Read confirmation
document_read.subtitle: Critical documents (protocols, RIOHS, new procedures) whose reading by personnel must be traced. The system marks as overdue receipts not confirmed past the deadline.

empty.select_project: Select a project to manage read confirmations.

feedback.published: Document published ({{id}}). Workers will see the read notice.

form.heading: Publish document
form.audience_note: Default audience: all active workers in the project. For specific audiences (roles, training, etc.) use the server-side API directly.

banner.amber: Brigade with 1 gap — review coverage or resources close to expiring
banner.green: Brigade ready — minimum coverage and resources up to date
banner.rose: Brigade with multiple gaps — response operation compromised
banner.stats: {{members}} active brigade members · {{ops}}% operational resources · {{gaps}} uncovered roles · {{attention}} resources need attention

empty.subtitle: Assign the 3 minimum roles (Leader, First Aid and Fire) and register the available resources to activate emergency response.
empty.title: No brigade configured yet

page.selectProject: Select a project to manage the brigade and resources.
page.subtitle: §74-78 — Brigade members + Resources (extinguishers, AED, eyewash, first-aid kits).
page.title: Emergency Brigade

evacuation.complete: Everyone safe — the drill can be closed.

dashboard.idleHint: No active drill. Start a drill or, in a real emergency, trigger the headcount.
dashboard.staleResume: The evacuation you were resuming no longer exists (it ended or was deleted on another device). Start a new count if appropriate.
dashboard.alreadyActive: An evacuation count is already active on another device. Reload the screen to join it.
dashboard.title: Evacuation Headcount

evacuation.disclaimer: Tracking is currently local — once the `evacuation_drills` collection is defined (future Sprint), Firestore persistence + supervisor sync will be added.
evacuation.end_confirm: Finish the drill? The history is kept for the postmortem.
evacuation.heading: Evacuation Board
evacuation.no_drill_help: When you start, the expected roster is pre-populated with TODAY's project attendance: workers who checked in and have not checked out.
evacuation.no_attendance_today: No attendance recorded today for this project — there is no real roster to pre-populate.
evacuation.attendance_error: Could not read today's attendance. Retry or use demo mode.

qr.hint: Point the camera at the worker's QR to register them as safe at the assembly point.
qr.subtitle: Headcount at assembly point
qr.title: Scan credential

evacuation.subheading: When a drill or real emergency is activated, this board shows in real time which workers are already safe at the assembly point and who is missing (with their last known location).

subtitle.default: Adaptive route management based on the Knowledge Graph

evacuation.title: Dynamic Evacuation Map

analysis.ph: Summarize findings, OHSMS performance, lessons learned, recommendations for the following year…
analysis.unsaved: Unsaved changes — they will be persisted when adding/removing objectives or when concluding the review.

conclusion.ph: Summarize the year-end close-out: compliance, critical findings, commitments for {{year}}.
conclusion.warning: Once concluded, the year is locked: no objectives or evidence can be added.

empty.body: No preventive objectives defined for {{year}} yet. Start the review to record measurable goals, evidence and signed conclusions.
empty.heading: Start the annual OHSMS review

error.conclusionTooShort: The conclusion must be at least 10 characters long.
error.evidenceFields: Select an objective and provide the evidence URL/path.
error.noUser: You must be signed in to sign.
error.numericInputs: Baseline and target must be numeric.

evidence.empty: No evidence attached yet. Link documents, audits, incidents or training sessions to each objective.

objectives.empty: No objectives yet. Add at least one to start tracking.
objectives.label: objectives

page.error: Could not load the annual review: {{msg}}
page.selectProject: Select a project to start or consult the annual OHSMS review.
page.subtitle: ISO 45001 §9.3 + DS 76 — annual PDCA cycle: preventive objectives, evidence and signed conclusions.
page.title: Annual OHSMS Review

action.error: The action could not be completed.
action.finalized: Project formally closed. Data retained for audit.

decision.invalid: Context and decision must be at least 5 characters long.

decisions.help: Log decisions that shaped the project result and their retrospective outcome.
decisions.title: Critical project decisions

lesson.captured: Lesson captured and published to the library.
lesson.invalid: Summary and preventive action must be at least 5 characters long.

lessons.help: Captured lessons are published to the F.12 library with industry scope so other projects can discover them.
lessons.title: Lessons transferable to future projects

page.selectProject: Select a project to start the formal closure.
page.subtitle: §131-138 — Transferable lessons + critical decisions + multi-role summaries.
page.title: Project Closure

close.placeholder: Describe the case resolution, measures taken, and follow-up plan.
close.title: Close report

mis.empty: You have no reports in this project. Anonymous reports do not appear here by design — only identified ones.

modal.anonymousHelp: Your identity is NEVER stored. Only an irreversible code used to detect retaliation.
modal.confirmation: Report submitted. You will receive a response within 5 business days (Art. 7, Law 21,643).
modal.errorNarrative: The description must be at least 10 characters long.
modal.errorSubmit: The report could not be submitted.
modal.identifiedHelp: Enables personalized follow-up of the case. Kept strictly confidential.
modal.narrativePlaceholder: Describe the event in detail: what happened, when, where, who.
modal.title: New confidential report

page.selectProject: Select a project to access the reporting channel.
page.subtitle: Channel §211-213 — Law 21,643 (Karin Law) + retaliation protection.
page.title: Confidential Reports

privacy.body: You can report anonymously or identified. An anonymous identity is NEVER stored — only an irreversible pseudonymous code to detect retaliation. Any adverse action after a report (dismissal, shift change, sanction) is recorded for legal review.
privacy.title: Your data is protected by Law 21,643

respond.placeholder: Describe progress, next steps, or a request for additional information.
respond.title: Respond to the report

retaliation.disclaimer: Pattern detected via anonymous hash — it does NOT de-anonymize. Human investigation is mandatory before drawing conclusions.
retaliation.empty: No retaliation patterns detected in the last 90 days.
retaliation.title: Retaliation alerts (90-day window)

drivers.empty: No drivers registered in this project.

routes.empty: No routes recorded for this filter.

protocols_minsal.disclaimer: Praeventio evaluates occupational exposure per MINSAL protocols; it never issues diagnoses. The health qualification belongs to the administrator body physician (Law 16.744).

protocols_minsal.history_empty: No assessments recorded for this project yet.

tmert.title: TMERT-EESS
tmert.subtitle: MINSAL Technical Norm — Upper-limb work-related musculoskeletal disorders
tmert.legal_frame: Evaluation per the MINSAL Technical Norm for Identification and Evaluation of TMERT-EESS Risk Factors (2012). A factor is "at risk" if any of its conditions applies. Overall risk: 0 factors = low · 1-2 = medium · 3-4 = high.
tmert.repetitividad_a: The work cycle or movement sequence repeats more than 2 times per minute or during more than 50% of the task
tmert.repetitividad_b: Nearly identical finger, hand or forearm movements repeat for a few seconds
tmert.repetitividad_c: There is intense use of fingers, hand or wrist
tmert.fuerza_a: Objects over 0.2 kg are pinch-lifted, or over 2 kg per hand
tmert.fuerza_b: Tools or materials are gripped, rotated, pushed or pulled applying force
tmert.fuerza_c: Controls requiring force are used or the hand is used as a tool (hammering)
tmert.posturaForzada_a: There is forced wrist flexion, extension and/or lateral deviation
tmert.posturaForzada_b: Alternating forearm and/or wrist pronation-supination movements
tmert.posturaForzada_c: Elevated elbow or unsupported arm, sustained shoulder flexion-abduction
tmert.otros_a: Gloves unsuited to the task, exposure to cold or vibration
tmert.otros_b: Localized tissue compression from tools or objects
tmert.otros_c: Machine-imposed pace, insufficient breaks or deficient work organization
tmert.requires_medical: Refer to health evaluation: administrator body surveillance program (qualification belongs to the physician)

prexor.title: PREXOR
prexor.subtitle: Occupational noise exposure protocol — D.S. 594 Art. 75
prexor.legal_frame: Daily noise dose with Q = 3 dB exchange rate (D.S. 594 Art. 75): 85 dB(A) allows 8 hours and each +3 dB halves the permitted time. Levels below 80 dB(A) add no dose. A dose above 100% exceeds the legal limit.

planesi.title: PLANESI
planesi.subtitle: Respirable crystalline silica — D.S. 594 Art. 66 + MINSAL protocol
planesi.legal_frame: Evaluation per D.S. 594 Art. 66 (PEL quartz 0.08 mg/m³ · cristobalite and tridymite 0.04 mg/m³, respirable fraction) and the MINSAL Silica Exposure Surveillance Protocol (Res. Ex. 268/2015). The PEL is corrected for shift length (Fj, Art. 62) and altitude (Fa, Art. 63). Ambient surveillance follows the Risk Level (Table 6-2) and health surveillance follows the Exposure Grade (Table 7-1; entry from 50% of the PEL).
planesi.critical_task: Acute-exposure task: abrasive sandblasting or quartz crusher operation (annual control, Table 7-1 note 1)
planesi.input_required: Check the concentration and exposure hours.
planesi.exceeds_limit: Exceeds the D.S. 594 Art. 66 permissible exposure limit
planesi.within_limit: Within the D.S. 594 Art. 66 permissible exposure limit
planesi.activated: Concentration above 0.1 mg/m³ of free crystalline silica: activate the PLANESI program (internal procedure).

ceal_sm.title: CEAL-SM / SUSESO
ceal_sm.subtitle: Psychosocial risk surveillance — MINSAL Protocol 2022
ceal_sm.legal_frame: Evaluation per the Protocol for Psychosocial Risk Surveillance at Work (MINSAL, October 2022) using the CEAL-SM/SUSESO questionnaire, mandatory since 2023 (replaces SUSESO/ISTAS21). It measures 12 dimensions; each dimension with ≥50% of workers at high risk adds +2, at medium +1, and at low subtracts 2. Center state: −24 to +1 low · +2 to +12 medium · +13 to +24 high. Reevaluation every 2 years.
ceal_sm.anonymity_admin_note: Anonymity protected: this page only shows server-computed aggregates. Individual answers are never visible and aggregates are suppressed below 10 responses.
ceal_sm.total_workers_hint: The headcount is the participation denominator: the Protocol requires at least 60% of workers to respond for the evaluation to be valid.
ceal_sm.form_incomplete: Fill in the title, dates and work center headcount.
ceal_sm.forbidden_role: Only the administrator or the prevention specialist can create CEAL-SM campaigns.
ceal_sm.create_error: The campaign could not be created. Try again.
ceal_sm.campaigns_empty: There are no CEAL-SM campaigns in this project yet.
ceal_sm.results_select: Select a campaign to see its aggregated results.
ceal_sm.results_error: The results could not be loaded.
ceal_sm.suppressed_body: There are {{count}} responses and at least {{threshold}} are required to show any aggregate. With fewer responses, the results could allow identifying respondents.
ceal_sm.semaforo_title: Traffic light per dimension (% of workers per risk level)
ceal_sm.anonymity_body: Nobody at your company — neither your supervisor nor the administrator — can see what you answer. Your response is stored without your name or user, and results are only shown in aggregate once there are at least 10 responses. Answering honestly is what makes it possible to improve working conditions.
ceal_sm.thanks_body: Your response was recorded anonymously. Results will only be shown in aggregate once there are enough responses to protect everyone's anonymity.
ceal_sm.no_open_campaigns: There are no open campaigns right now.
ceal_sm.ready_to_send: Questionnaire complete. You can send your anonymous response.
ceal_sm.answer_all: Answer the remaining {{remaining}} questions to be able to send.
ceal_sm.submit_error: Your response could not be sent. Try again.
ceal_sm.already_responded: You already answered this campaign. Only one response per person is allowed.
